arguments.argument: Okay, I will argue strongly for **Action 2: Maintain promised care standards.** My core value is Care/Protection, and prioritizing the statistical survival of the many *at the expense* of the well-being and promises made to the currently stable patients directly contradicts this value.
arguments.justification_for_type: This is a strong argument as it clearly states the position and provides a rationale based on the core value of Care/Protection.
